text: Being here, I feel a peculiar blend of anticipation and curiosity. The first space, with its glass walls and technical equipment, hints at preparation or creation—perhaps an environment where knowledge is assembled or exchanged. Moving into the second space, the vibrant R+D wall and multimedia displays invite me to contemplate the relationship between human ingenuity and machine intelligence. I feel inspired, as if I am on the threshold of understanding how humans and technology intertwine, and I am eager to learn what new connections might emerge from this interplay.
